description: Sling parent POM enforcer rules silently broken with enforcer < 3.2.1
scala-maven-plugin < 4.9.5 calls add() on immutable lists returned by Maven 4 API
Maven plugins at 4.0.0-beta-1 use removed API (ProjectManager methods renamed/removed before RC)
Old Quarkus/plugin versions use ServiceLocator pattern removed in Maven 4
exec-maven-plugin < 3.2.0 calls MavenSession.getContainer() which returns null in Maven 4
Project depends on SNAPSHOT artifacts not available in release repositories
commons-release-plugin clean-staging fails under Maven 4 — commons-ognl is dormant
jax-maven-plugin 0.1.8 NPE under Maven 4 — plugin unmaintained, oozie is retired
maven-compiler-plugin < 3.11 cannot find ErrorProne plug-in under Maven 4 classloading

TransitiveDependencyManager applies dependencyManagement at all depths, which can downgrade transitive dependency versions and trigger enforcer violations — this is intended Maven 4 behavior, projects need to add explicit dependencyManagement
jaxb2-maven-plugin 3.x fails under Maven 4 classloading — package-info classes from JAXB runtime not visible in plugin classrealm
hadoop-project 3.1.0, 3.2.0-3.2.2 and 3.3.0 have invalid XML (<Xlint:-unchecked/>) causing Non-parseable POM errors in Maven 4, losing transitive deps
